_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop analytical techniques to gain more target information.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to select the appropriate analytical method for a given business question, balancing statistical rigor, time constraints, data availability, and audience comprehension capacity.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.499), AB-S-003 (AB, cosine: 0.472).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.459). Shared vocabulary: [analytical]. DCWF-only terms [develop, gain, information, more, target, techniques] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, appropriate, audience, availability, balancing, business] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.882, R=0.849). P exceeds R by 0.033 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Develop analytical techniques to gain more target information." and "Ability to select the appropriate analytical method for a given business questio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.517 > STS 0.459 (gap +0.058). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [analytical] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [analytical]. DCWF-only: [develop, gain, information, more, target, techniques]. WIDAI-only: [ability, appropriate, audience, availability, balancing, business].
